chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Rev. Appl. No. S- 53 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.01.2026 For orders on office objections For orders on MA 3646/23 For hearing of main case None present This is third date of hearing when the applicant and his counsel have remained absent.
